New Hire On-Boarding Checklist 

Lab Tour 

Flow Core 

Instruments 

Prep Areas 

Incubator 

Reagent Storage 

Desk/Computer  

CIBR 

Labs 

Break Room 

Autoclave 

Lab Coat Room 

BIORESCO 

9th Floor 

Dr. Fan’s Office 

GMP Lab 

General layout around Bressler 

EHS Training 

In-person (chemical, hazardous waste and, bloodborne pathogens) 

HR Training 

Title IX 

COVID 

USB Drive Items 

Parking Pass 

Badge Access 

Badge itself 

BRB 

7th Floor 

Conversation About Expectations 

Preferred Management Style 

Previous Lab Experience 

Training Flow 

iLabs 

Create account 

Make sure you can access core-specific functions (Core Member Role) 

Tasks 

Daily 

Refill reagents 

Refill supplies 

Sterility results 

QC (To be added later) 

Weekly 

Eye Wash 

Trash 

Lab Coats 

Monthly 

Data backup 

Long cleans (To be added later)
